changelog: Multi-stage checkpoint & resume (steps 1-3, per-file resume in image analysis)
Resume prompt after Stop and after power loss
Statistics now counted from actual folders (accurate after interruptions)
Scan duration excludes pauses; average speed for actual scan time
Stats summary window with re-open button and TXT export (scan duration, speed, healthy estimate)
TXT export headers for all three lists, translated
Move retry + copy fallback + move_errors_log.csv for unmovable files
Pure C# JPEG/PNG stream validator (no external czkawka)
Single Stop button for all steps; step name shown under buttons
